Who We Are

Building Wichita, One Project at a Time

Anew Contruccion & Renovation LLC started with a simple goal: to provide homeowners in Wichita with reliable and high-quality general contracting services. Founded by [Founder's Name] over a decade ago, we've grown from a small team to a trusted name in home improvement across Sedgwick County.

We believe in transparent communication, meticulous attention to detail, and a commitment to exceeding expectations. From initial consultation to final walkthrough, we prioritize your vision and ensure a seamless and stress-free renovation experience. Our approach is rooted in honesty, integrity, and a genuine passion for creating spaces that homeowners love.

As a local Wichita business, we're deeply invested in the community. We support local initiatives and strive to contribute positively to the neighborhoods we serve. We understand the unique needs and challenges of Wichita homes, from weathering the Kansas storms to maintaining the charm of College Hill residences.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction

Local Expertise

Customer Satisfaction

Prioritizing your vision and ensuring a positive experience.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Anew Contruccion & Renovation did an amazing job remodeling our master bathroom! They helped us pick out beautiful tile and fixtures, and the whole process was so smooth. Our new walk-in shower is my favorite part. Highly recommend!

Sarah K. Bathroom Remodeling
“

We had some storm damage to our roof after a bad hailstorm. Anew Contruccion & Renovation came out quickly and provided a fair estimate for the repairs. They were professional and efficient, and our roof looks great now. Would use them again.

John M. Roofing Services
“

We absolutely love our new kitchen! Anew Contruccion & Renovation helped us design a functional and beautiful space that perfectly fits our needs. The team was communicative throughout the entire process, and we couldn't be happier with the results. Special thanks to the project manager, David, for his attention to detail.

Emily R. Kitchen Remodeling
“

Anew Contruccion & Renovation transformed our unfinished basement into a fantastic family room. They were professional, reliable, and the quality of their work is outstanding. They even added a small bathroom downstairs for us. Very happy with the outcome!

Robert L. Basement Finishing
“

We hired Anew Contruccion & Renovation to build a new deck in our backyard. The deck is beautiful and well-built. There were a few minor delays due to weather, but the team communicated clearly and kept us informed. Overall, a great experience.

Jessica P. Deck & Patio Construction
“

Our old siding was looking pretty rough, so we decided to replace it. Anew Contruccion & Renovation did a fantastic job installing new vinyl siding on our home. The house looks brand new! The crew was efficient and cleaned up everything afterwards. Highly recommend their siding services.

Michael S. Siding Installation

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a kitchen remodel typically take?
The duration of a kitchen remodel varies depending on the scope of the project, but typically takes between 4-8 weeks. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.
Do I need to move out during the remodel?
While it's not always necessary to move out, you may find it more comfortable to do so, especially during the demolition phase. We'll work with you to minimize disruption and create a safe and manageable environment.
What are the latest trends in kitchen remodeling?
Popular trends in Wichita include open-concept designs, quartz countertops, energy-efficient appliances, and smart home integration. We stay up-to-date on the latest trends and can help you incorporate them into your design.
